case_title: BARNETT VIOLETT VS ESQIBEL RAYMOND et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BARNETT VIOLETT AS TO DEFENDANT ESQIBEL RAYMOND LEIGHTON LINDA NORFIC CORP. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEIGHTON LINDA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARNETT VIOLETT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESQIBEL RAYMOND LEIGHTON LINDA NORFIC CORP. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESQIBEL RAYMOND
